title: see invis players
description: (See Invis Players) allows you to see invisible players as slightly transparent bodys
body:
# See-Invis-Players

This mod makes players with the invisibility effect visible again by rendering their model slightly transparent even while invisible. It is intended for client-side use and may be considered unfair on multiplayer servers.

### **Tip:** use this mod together with [PlayerView](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerview) to give invis player glowing so you can see them even better 😉🤝


## Dependencies

- **Minecraft Verion:** Minecraft Java Fabric 1.21.11
- **ModMenu Version:** 17.0.0

![Mod menu settings screenshot showing configuration options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ae4d84d16893647195e23dd4987e57136e4afe4_0.webp)
